g.text: Chamilo LMS 2.0 — Deployment / Container Diagram (Physical View)
In many deployments, Apache/Nginx and PHP-FPM
may run on the same VM without Docker.
This diagram shows a containerized setup for clarity.
- Frontend assets built by Yarn/Encore -> public/build/
- Storage: local (uploads) or cloud via Flysystem adapters
- JWT keys stored under config/jwt (generated via bin/console)
